message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
You already asked that—if you need verification, please share another way to confirm because I’m trying to sort out a payment plan.

Understood. If you’re not comfortable verifying in this chat, I’ll stop the assessment here and pass forward that you want to discuss a payment plan without sharing verification details in this channel.

Priority for Agent 2: review policy-allowed options in next_allowed_actions and address hardship/review first as applicable, but avoid further verification requests in this channel and do not repeat capacity questions already answered in case state; do not present account-specific options unless policy permits without further verification."}

Thanks, please note that I’m willing to make a small payment now and a larger one after my salary is credited, if someone can contact me with realistic options.

I’ve noted that you can make a small payment now and a larger payment after your salary is credited. Based on the current policy, any payment arrangement must complete within 30 days, and exact approved plan or reduced-closure terms cannot be confirmed from the available data in this channel. I’ve recorded your request for realistic options and your preference to be contacted only with a concrete approved option. Given the hardship indicators on file, your case should be reviewed on that basis first.
